    P

    pcPane - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    The UI pane for the PC ordering system.
    performanceLabel - Variable in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Label for player's performance summary at the end of the game.
    Plate - Class in entity.containers
    Represents a plate container.
    Plate() - Constructor for class entity.containers.Plate
    Constructs a new Plate container.
    PLATE - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    play() - Method in class util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
    Plays the current music internally.
    play() - Method in class util.wrapper.SoundEffect
    Plays the sound effect at the current SFX volume.
    play(double) - Method in class util.wrapper.SoundEffect
    Plays the sound effect at the current SFX volume and with given playback speed.
    playAnimation() - Method in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    Plays the animation indefinitely.
    playAnimation(int) - Method in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    Plays the animation for a specific number of repetitions.
    playButtonOnClick(MouseEvent) - Method in class gui.MainMenu
    Handles the play button click event.
    playDialog() - Method in class gui.TutorialScene
    Plays the next dialog in the sequence.
    playDialogFromString(TextFlow, ImageView, ImageView, String, double) - Static method in class util.DialogManager
    Plays a dialog sequence from a string into a TextFlow.
    playerCash - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    Player's current cash amount,
    playerItemOnHand - Variable in class logic.GameInstance
    ItemSprite on player's hand
    playFadeInAnimation() - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Plays fade in animation of the scene
    playFadeInAnimation() - Method in class gui.MainMenu
    Plays fade in animation of the scene
    playFadeInAnimation() - Method in class gui.SettingsMenu
    Plays fade in animation of the scene
    playFadeInAnimation() - Method in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Plays fade in animation of the scene
    playFadeInAnimation() - Method in class gui.TutorialScene
    Plays fade in animation of the scene
    playing - Variable in class sprites.AnimatedSprite
    A flag indicating if the animation is currently playing.
    playing - Static variable in class util.DialogManager
    A flag indicating if a dialog animation is currently playing.
    playRandomClickSound() - Static method in class util.SFXManager
    Plays a random click sound effect from the loaded pool.
    playRandomDialogSound() - Static method in class util.SFXManager
    Plays dialog sound effect with different playback speed.
    playTrack(BGMManager.TrackName) - Method in class util.BGMManager
    Plays the specified track, stopping the current one if necessary.
    playTranslateTransitionY(Node, double, double, double) - Method in class gui.SummaryMenu
    Plays translate transition for the Summary Menu UI components.
    Pot - Class in logic.counters
    Counter for boiling ingredients.
    Pot(double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class logic.counters.Pot
    Constructs a Pot.
    Potato - Class in entity.ingredients
    Represents a potato ingredient.
    Potato() - Constructor for class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Constructs a new Potato ingredient.
    POTATO - Enum constant in enum class logic.ItemSpriteType
    Enum constant for item sprite type.
    previousCounter - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The previous counter the sprite was on before being moved.
    previousRoom - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The previous room the sprite was in before being moved.
    previousX - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The previous X coordinate before the sprite was moved.
    previousY - Variable in class sprites.ItemSprite
    The previous Y coordinate before the sprite was moved.
    primaryScene - Static variable in class application.Main
    The primary JavaFX Scene of the application.
    pX - Variable in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    The X coordinate for the middle of the box.
    pY - Variable in class logic.counters.BaseCounter
    The Y coordinate for the middle of the box.
